title: Changing field layout in workform
excerpt: Within workform /forms is there the ability in the layout to move the fields side by side, instead of having every field vertically one after another?  Example I want the user name and user email address horizontally nex…

posts.author: DeeMc (Dee Mc)
posts.cookedHtml: Within workform /forms is there the ability in the layout to move the fields side by side, instead of having every field vertically one after another? Example I want the user name and user email address horizontally next to each other. Is that possible, as I do not see that option?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DeeMc

Our monday form builder app, Easyform, supports up to 4 side-by-side questions in a row.

In addition, you can replace the question titles with placeholders for more compact forms.

Check out our documentation site on how to set the width of the questions.

You can contact us at easyformsupport@easyappshq.com or book a call with us here, and we will help set up your forms and boards.

EasyApps Support Team
